title: Google Gemma 4: Local AI Power for Video & Robotics! #shorts
summary: Google Gemma 4 is a local AI model enabling on-device inference for video understanding and robotics applications. The tool emphasizes privacy benefits and reduced latency through edge-based processing rather than cloud dependency.
